questionHtml:
An alarm will sound if the ship travels within 20 kilometres of the lighthouse.

State whether the alarm will sound. Give a reason for your answer.
markschemeHtml:
the alarm will sound            A1

LS→=19.2…<20            R1


Note: Do not award A1R0.

 

[2 marks]
